name: io.github.u-c4n/autocad-mcp
title: AutoCAD MCP Pro
description: AutoCAD automation for AI agents: live COM or headless ezdxf, ISO dims, GD&T, quality gate.

environmentVariables.name: AUTOCAD_MCP_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: Backend selection: auto (default), com (live AutoCAD, Windows) or ezdxf (headless DXF).

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated absolute paths the server may read and write. Empty blocks file access outside temp.

environmentVariables.name: TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Exposed tool profile: full (default), core or lean.
